title: 23:20 ГўВҖВ” August 28, 2023
body_text:
23:20 ГўВҖВ” August 28, 2023
Update to Wires Routing Instruction Forms and the Wires Part
We made changes to the layout of the Incoming Wires Routing Instructions forms and the related Section in the Wires Part. Login procedures were updated in the Wires Part to reflect login via the Client Centre and all references to the secure site were updated to the Client Centre. We also made other minor changes to the Part.
Electronic Payments Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.7, Wires Document Library
We added ISO 20022 Return Code Definitions, Form 9610.
Section 2.1. Definitions
We added Client Centre and Client Centre User definitions.
Section 4.4, Wires Data Extract Service
We added a note that financial institutions and AML vendors should manually review wires with a cross-border status of ГўВҖВңVerify Manually.ГўВҖВқ
We clarified that the Wires data extract contains all wires.
Section 5.2, Setting up a Centralized Wires Environment
We clarified the procedure for setting up a centralized Wires environment.
Section 5.3, Setting up a Partially Centralized Wires Environment
We clarified the procedure for setting up a partially centralized Wires environment.
Section 6.2, Logging in to MTS
We updated the MTS login procedure.
Section 7.2, Granting MTS Administrator Access to a Client Centre User
We updated the CPS Admin login procedure.
Section 8.2, Granting Wires Access to a Client Centre User
We updated the CPS Admin login procedure.
Section 10.1, Logging in to Wires
We updated the Wires login procedure.
Section 17.4, Completing the Wire Amount Section
We added a note clarifying that a US correspondent bank isnГўВҖВҷt required when sending US dollar wires sent to another Wires participating financial institution.
Section 20.4, Wires Search and Reports Function
We moved the Wires search and reporting procedures to a new section. The subsequent Chapter were renumbered, and all references were updated to reflect the change.
Section 23.1, Overview of Cancelling Outgoing Wires Pending Approval
We corrected the ГўВҖВңAuthorize Outgoing TransfersГўВҖВқ permission name.
Section 24.2, Routing Instructions for Incoming Wires
We updated the images to reflect changes to the Wires routing instruction forms.
We also added a statement reminding financial institutions to ensure the forms are completed with their route/transit as the beneficiary financial institution. Incomplete or incorrectly completed forms can result in wires being delayed or returned.
Section 24.7, Returning Incoming Wires
We added a note that the return amount is editable and updated the image to reflect the change.
Section 25.2, Initiating Trace Requests, Recalls, and Amendments for Outgoing Wires
We updated the ServiceNow login procedure.
Section 26, Overview of Settlement
We added ГўВҖВңand Other Central 1 clientsГўВҖВқ to the BC and Ontario settlement procedure.
Section 28.1, Processing Inter-Branch Transfers in Wires
We added ГўВҖВңand Other Central 1 clientsГўВҖВқ to the procedure.
Document Library
Status
Routing Instructions ГўВҖВ“ Canadian Dollar (CAD) Domestic Incoming Wire Transfers
2605
We updated the layout of the beneficiary financial institution route, transit, and beneficiary customer account number fields. We also added a reminder that the form must be completed with your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs information and that missing, or incorrect information may result in the incoming wire being delayed or returned.
Revised
